sources.excerpt: Official Cafesano homepage identifies the two Virginia locations.
Current official lunch/dinner page covers food and nonalcoholic menu categories and both locations.
Official locations page separately lists Reston and Dulles.
Current Toast Reston menu at 11130 M South Lakes Dr.
Current Toast Dulles menu at 21305 Windmill Parc Dr.
2022 printable menu retained as stale supporting evidence.
Broad suitability labels only; no item-level allergen negatives.
Official site search found no current allergen matrix.
Document search found only broad ingredient notice, no item-level matrix.
Both Toast location pages lack an allergen matrix.
Targeted search found no current official matrix.

proposedChanges: Use official lunch/dinner HTML as the sole complete current publishing surface.
Exclude headings, descriptions, options, sizes, toppings, blog cards, alcohol, and duplicate presentations.
Preserve only exact named allergens from item names/core descriptions; no mayContain inference.
